extracted_codes.context: Could also include ICD code Z79.899, indicating 'Other long-term (current) drug therapy' due to no direct access to patient EHRs

clinical_criteria: Age at measurement ≥18 years (exclude measurements <18 years)
Exclude measurements from Inpatient or Emergency Department visits
Keep only measurements from Outpatient visits
Statistical outliers: Remove measurements outside Q1 - 3*IQR and Q3 + 3*IQR
BP adjustment: Add 15 mmHg to SBP and 10 mmHg to DBP if participant has record of BP lowering medication use before median BP measurement
Expected units: SBP and DBP in mm Hg
algorithm_summary: Multi-step blood pressure phenotype algorithm: 1) Extract SBP/DBP measurements using codes from CSV files (SBP_codes.csv, SBP_LOINC_codes.csv, DBP_codes.csv, DBP_LOINC_codes.csv), 2) Convert units to mm Hg, 3) Apply exclusions (age <18, inpatient/ED visits, end stage kidney disease, pregnancy), 4) Average measurements per visit (using 2nd and 3rd measurements if >2 available), 5) Remove statistical outliers using IQR method, 6) Calculate median value per individual with corresponding age and BMI, 7) Adjust for antihypertensive medications (ATC C02 codes) by adding 15/10 mmHg to SBP/DBP. Additional flagged conditions are tracked but don't exclude participants.
